name: Salesforce CRM
description: Sync Salesforce leads, contacts, opportunities and accounts into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Connected App Client ID
install_fields.help: From Salesforce Setup → App Manager → Connected App → Consumer Key

install_fields.label: Connected App Client Secret
install_fields.help: Consumer Secret from your Salesforce Connected App

install_fields.label: Instance URL
install_fields.help: Your Salesforce org URL. Auto-detected from OAuth if left blank.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the OAuth access token by pinging the Salesforce REST API root.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping the Salesforce REST API root and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync CRM Records
methods.description: Full or incremental sync of Leads, Contacts, and Opportunities into the knowledge base.

methods.name: SOQL Query
methods.description: Execute an arbitrary SOQL query against the org.

methods.name: List SObjects
methods.description: List all available SObject types in this org.

methods.name: Get SObject Record
methods.description: Retrieve a single SObject record by type and ID.

methods.name: List Leads
methods.description: List Leads ordered by creation date descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: List Contacts ordered by creation date descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Opportunities
methods.description: List Opportunities ordered by creation date descending via SOQL.

methods.name: List Accounts
methods.description: List Accounts ordered by creation date descending via SOQL.
